name: okf
description: Open Knowledge Format CLI, Go library, and Russian-language agent skill.

interface.shortDescription: Create, consult on, and validate OKF bundles.
interface.longDescription: Provides the open-knowledge-format skill plus Go module CLI guidance for creating, converting, enriching, and validating Open Knowledge Format bundles.
defaultPrompt: Use $open-knowledge-format to validate this OKF bundle.
Use $open-knowledge-format to design an OKF bundle.
Use $open-knowledge-format to convert these notes to OKF.
